---
title: "\'Conversation on Pictures, A\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Conversation on Pictures, A\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Non-fiction, art criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (June 1882) 586-90

### Notes

It describes her impressions of the Royal Academy Summer Exhibition of 1882.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
